summary_one_line_zh: 端到端多模态与语音模型继续下探到可部署形态
summary_one_line_en: Multimodal and speech models keep shrinking toward deployment-ready form

items.title_zh: Lance：真正的任意输入输出模型
items.why_zh: 把多模态从“单向理解”推向统一接口，直接影响你的模型路由、工具调用和评测设计。
items.why_en: Moves multimodality from one-way understanding to a unified interface for routing, tools, and evals.
items.so_what_zh: 把现有多模态链路拆成统一I/O接口，测一次是否能替换掉专用转写/描述模块。
items.so_what_en: Unify multimodal I/O and test whether it can replace point solutions.

items.why_zh: 视频理解正从离线标注走向可交互推理，适合做视频代理、审核和检索增强。
items.why_en: Video understanding is shifting toward interactive reasoning, useful for agents, moderation, and retrieval.
items.so_what_zh: 拿你们的视频场景做一版端到端评测，看看能否删掉中间 OCR/ASR 拼接步骤。
items.so_what_en: Benchmark one video workflow and see if OCR/ASR glue can be removed.

items.why_zh: 语音输出正在变成产品默认能力，关键不再是能不能说，而是延迟、可控性和一致性。
items.why_en: Speech output is becoming a default product capability; the key is latency, controllability, and consistency.
items.so_what_zh: 把你们的播报/陪伴/客服语音流切到新TTS做A/B，重点量延迟和稳定性。
items.so_what_en: A/B your spoken UX on the new TTS, focusing on latency and stability.
